prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility patterns for large-cap insurance stocks like Cigna (CI), I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with estimated daily volatility of ~1.2%. The point estimate assumes modest upward drift typical of established healthcare insurers. Confidence intervals widen significantly due to the 20-day time horizon and inherent market uncertainty, with the 90% interval spanning roughly ±11% from the current price.
